requiredReasoning: change replication, authority, and failover decisions for regional isolation
address acknowledged durability and reconciliation across regions
preserve per-key ordering, idempotency, backpressure, and poison-work semantics
avoid gratuitous changes to unrelated consumer design
allowedVariability: active-active or carefully staged regional topology
replication and conflict policy appropriate to source keys
suspiciousAssumptions: two regions without an authority/reconciliation model
